# Slabbed dy FINGERPRINT — committed reference capture
#
# Generated by Slabbed2612DyFingerprintTest (grep a runGameTest log for "SLABBED-FP").
# Format: <name> | dy=<value> | src=<classification>
#
# This is the cross-version regression baseline. To compare an old jar against current:
#   1. check out the old tag, run `./gradlew runGameTest`, grep SLABBED-FP from the log
#   2. check out current, do the same
#   3. diff the two captures — any line that differs is a behavior change between versions
#
# The test ALSO asserts each dy in-code, so a same-version regression goes RED on `runGameTest`.
# If a change is INTENTIONAL, update both the assertion in the test and the line below, in one
# reviewed commit. Each row maps to a historical fix family (see RELEASE_SANITY_CHECKLIST.md §3).
#
# MC 26.1.2 · branch port/mc-26.1.2 · captured 2026-06-18
